title: Forest Focus
description: Immerse yourself in the gentle rustle of leaves and birdsong to sharpen your concentration.

title: Ocean Calm
description: Let the rhythmic pull of ocean waves wash away tension and bring you into stillness.

title: Deep Sleep
description: Drift into restful sleep with low-frequency tones and the softest of night sounds.

title: Morning Reset
description: A gentle sunrise soundscape to clear your mind and set a calm intention for the day.

title: Rain Focus
description: Steady rain on a window pane creates the perfect white-noise backdrop for deep work.

title: Still Waters
description: A serene lake at dusk — minimal sound, maximum peace.
